sections.title: Chief Complaint
sections.description: Primary presenting concern in the patient's own words

sections.title: History of Present Illness
sections.description: Onset, duration, character, location, severity, associated symptoms, modifying factors

sections.title: Review of Systems
sections.description: Patient-reported symptoms across constitutional, cardiopulmonary, GI, GU, neuro, MSK, psych systems

sections.title: Past Medical, Social & Family History
sections.description: Active conditions, prior surgeries, current medications, allergies, social and family context that change the differential

sections.title: Vital Signs
sections.description: Vitals literally observed on a monitor or read aloud during the visit

sections.title: Physical Examination
sections.description: General appearance, system-specific findings as observed during the exam

sections.title: Assessment
sections.description: Working diagnosis as explicitly stated by the physician — no inference

sections.title: Plan
sections.description: Investigations, prescriptions, referrals, follow-up timeline, patient education as stated
